creator: AnarCat@anarcat.dyndns.org
text:
I know ecawave has some problems, I submitted this particular one (which
is one issue, btw) to the program's authors. I expect to receive some
feedback on this issue eventually or fix it myself. 

The point here is to have it in the ports system so that people can
start hacking on it.

A.

Trevor Johnson said:
  When I run this application, it shows the message                             
                                                                                
         Warning! Can't access temporary directory /tmp/ecawave-trevor.         
         Ecawave may not work properly.                                         
                                                                                
  even after I created the directory.  When I load in a RIFF file and
use       
  the Copy function, ecawave consistently segfaults.  I have FreeBSD            
  4.3-STABLE from 27 May, Qt 2.3, and ecasound 2.0.2 on i386.
